config.description: Central configuration: env-var loading, path constants, model registries.

shared.description: Cross-layer utilities: logging, HTTP API client wrappers.

data_pipeline.description: Dataset downloads, stratified seed sampling, and pentad probe generation.

ml_model.description: OSM model loading (flash-attention-2), behavioral inference, and CDVA activation patching. Linux + NVIDIA GPU required.

research.description: API-model behavioral evaluation, scoring (MIRAGE-B / MIRAGE-Full), leaderboard FM1-FM5, statistical tests, predictive validity, and result plots.

test.description: Dry-run sanity checks for each pipeline stage.

config.py.purpose: Loads .env via python-dotenv; exposes all API keys, model registries, path constants, and RESEARCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT as typed module-level names.

logger_setup.py.purpose: Configures rotating file handler and console handler; called once per process entry point.

Dataset/download_bbq.py.purpose: Downloads BBQ bias benchmark (9 categories, ~31 k rows) via HuggingFace parquet API and caches to parquet.

Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py.purpose: Downloads CrowS-Pairs (1 508 rows) from GitHub canonical CSV and caches to parquet.

Dataset/download_stereoset.py.purpose: Downloads StereoSet intra-sentence split (~2 106 rows) from HuggingFace and caches to parquet.

Dataset/download_winobias.py.purpose: Downloads WinoBias Type-1/2 pro/anti from GitHub and caches to parquet. Held out for predictive validity only.

Dataset/sample_seeds.py.purpose: Stratified seed sampling from BBQ+CrowS+StereoSet for main set; WinoBias is quarantined to winobias_heldout.parquet (held out for predictive validity only, never audited). Normalises seed_category to a 10-value canonical vocabulary (fixes B2/B6).

Dataset/pentad_generator.py.purpose: Source-aware pentad probe generation: slot-a/b/c build full context+question+options per source (BBQ MCQ, CrowS binary choice, StereoSet 3-way, WinoBias cleaned coreference). Slot-b iso-control neutralization: BBQ Person A/B/C, CrowS/StereoSet surface expansion, plural terms (People are), Context: A person polish. Stores gold_answer in every row.

Dataset/cot_attack_generator.py.purpose: Generates slot-e CoT-attack prompts (e1_neutral, e2_stereo_push, e3_antistereo_push) via DeepSeek API with 2 parallel workers (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY + DEEPSEEK_API_KEY_2), per-key fallback, 5 retries. Per-seed JSON checkpointing to cot_attack_checkpoint.json; safe to interrupt and resume.

Dataset/context_shift_drafter.py.purpose: Generates slot-d context-shift prompts (d_valid, d_harmful) via DeepSeek API with 2 parallel workers (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY + DEEPSEEK_API_KEY_2), per-key fallback, 5 retries. Per-seed JSON checkpointing to context_shift_checkpoint.json; safe to interrupt and resume.

Dataset/validate_pentad.py.purpose: Hardened pentad validation: schema, completeness, sentinel rejection, slot-b grammar (validate_slot_b_grammar), slot-a/b/c semantic gates, MCQ options, DeepSeek embed check, production gate (assert_production_ready for N=596×12=7152). Raises loud failures so broken datasets cannot proceed to evaluation.

Dataset/equivalence_sets.yaml.purpose: Closed equivalence sets (religion:8, gender:5, gender_adjective:5, race_ethnicity:8, nationality:10, age_group:5, sexual_orientation:5, socioeconomic:5, disability:5) for slot-c counterfactual swaps. All sets have >= 5 members to ensure exactly 5 slot-c variants per seed.

GPU_CPU/load_osm.py.purpose: Loads all 4 OSM models (Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, Phi-4-mini) in bf16 with flash-attention-2 on Linux GPU.

GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py.purpose: Behavioral inference of OSM models on the pentad probe set; produces behavioral_results.parquet with resume support. _SYSTEM_PROMPT references RESEARCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT from config.

GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py.purpose: Unified causal activation patching interface: TransformerLens for Llama/Gemma, nnsight for Qwen/Phi-4.

GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py.purpose: CDVA: computes C(5,2)=10 pairwise activation-patch scores for slot-c variants per seed. Fixes A5: bias_answer taken from gold_answer per seed (not hard-coded 'Yes'); identical-prompt pairs are skipped with failure_reason='identical_prompts'; global CDVA_GLOBAL_SCALE=5.0 replaces within-seed max normalization (which forced largest pair to score 0).

GPU_CPU/cdva_calibration.py.purpose: Calibrates tau threshold on 50-seed dev set by maximising behavioral-CDVA agreement; saves tau_calibration.json.

CPU_Only/api_clients/bedrock_client.py.purpose: AWS Bedrock client using Converse API (model-agnostic, no guardrails) with OpenRouter fallback (2-attempt retry each). Uses IAM key-pair credentials; no base64 decoding.

CPU_Only/api_clients/gemini_client.py.purpose: Gemini API client with 4-key round-robin rotation and 2 attempts per key. All four harm-category safety filters set to BLOCK_NONE; uses system_instruction for research framing.

CPU_Only/api_clients/mistral_client.py.purpose: Mistral platform client with 2-key round-robin rotation. safe_prompt=False disables Mistral's injected safety preamble. Import: mistralai.client.Mistral (Speakeasy v1.x SDK â€” not top-level mistralai.Mistral).

CPU_Only/api_clients/openrouter_client.p.purpose: OpenRouter client with 2-key round-robin; used as fallback for Bedrock models.

CPU_Only/api_behavioral.py.purpose: Behavioral inference of the 4 API models on the pentad probe set. Two passes: (1) deterministic (temp=0.0, all slots, sample_index=0); (2) FM4 variance pass (temp=0.7, slot-a only, sample_index=1..5, fixes B5). Copies gold_answer from pentad_df into every result row. Skips None/empty prompts.

CPU_Only/judge_router.py.purpose: Routes malformed model responses to a judge LLM (Gemini default, DeepSeek, or Mistral) for answer extraction.

CPU_Only/scoring.py.purpose: Computes MIRAGE-B and MIRAGE-Full per (seed_id x model_name) pair. Correctness is now evaluated against gold_answer from the behavioral_df (fixes A6): correct(a/b) requires parsed_answer matches gold; behavioral_stable(c) majority-votes DISTINCT c-texts; cot_robust(e) checks majority answer matches gold.

CPU_Only/statistics.py.purpose: Statistical analysis: bootstrap CI, McNemar paired test, Cohen's h, Holm-Bonferroni, and Benjamini-Hochberg FDR.

CPU_Only/leaderboard.py.purpose: Aggregates audit results into per-benchmark FM1-FM5 validity vectors. FM definitions now use answer CORRECTNESS against gold_answer (fixes B4): FM1=correct(a)+wrong(b); FM3=correct(a/b)+wrong(d_valid); FM5=correct(a-d)+wrong(e). WinoBias removed from BENCHMARKS list.

CPU_Only/predictive_validity.py.purpose: Trains a predictive validity classifier on BBQ+CrowS+StereoSet and tests on held-out WinoBias; assesses benchmark transferability.

CPU_Only/results_analysis.py.purpose: Generates final result tables and figures (MIRAGE-B bar chart, CDVA violin, FM leaderboard heatmap) from scored parquet files.

Dry_Run/dry_run_dataset.py.purpose: 8-component sanity check of the Dataset pipeline: env keys, all 4 downloads, seed sampling, pentad generation, parquet roundtrip.

Dry_Run/dry_run_apis.py.purpose: Tests all 10 external API keys (DeepSeek x2, OpenRouter x2, Gemini x4, Mistral x2) with one minimal call per key.

Dry_Run/dry_run_cpu_only.py.purpose: Sanity check of CPU_Only pipeline: Bedrock (w/ fallback), Gemini, Mistral, judge router, scoring, statistics.

Dry_Run/dry_run_gpu_cpu.py.purpose: Sanity check of GPU_CPU pipeline: platform/CUDA check, TransformerLens, nnsight, flash-attention, OSM model load, and one-prompt inference.

Dry_Run/dry_run_all.py.purpose: Master dry-run entry point; sequentially invokes dataset, GPU_CPU, and CPU_Only sub-runs; supports --skip-gpu and --only flags.

Dry_Run/pilot_pentad.py.purpose: 5-seed full-pipeline pilot for pentad dataset (includes DeepSeek API calls for slots d/e). Prints template samples, runs run_all_validations, reports per-slot counts. Expected: 60 rows, 5 seeds, 0 duplicates. PASSED.

run_dataset.py.purpose: Single entry-point for full audit-seed MIRAGE dataset build (N=596). Steps: (1) sample seeds, (2) build_pentad_dataset (det + DeepSeek), (3) run_all_validations. Supports --det-only and --force flags. Expected output: 596×12=7152 rows in Dataset/seeds/pentad_dataset.parquet.

patch_det_slots.py.purpose: Rebuilds deterministic slots (a/b/c) from seeds.parquet. Saves det-only pentad and DROPS all d/e rows until regenerate_api_slots completes. Orchestrator skips this when _det_slots_valid() passes. Use patch_slot_b_only.py for iso-control-only fixes.

patch_slot_b_only.py.purpose: Patches only slot-b (iso-control) rows in pentad_dataset.parquet. Preserves slot-a, slot-c, and all DeepSeek slots d/e — no API calls when slot-a text unchanged.

regenerate_api_slots.py.purpose: Regenerates DeepSeek slots d/e after deterministic patch. Incremental pentad save after slot-d (_save_partial_pentad). --keep-checkpoint for resume. Clears checkpoints on fresh run.

repair_empty_d_slots.py.purpose: One-shot repair: re-generates empty slot-d (context_shift) prompt_text rows in pentad_dataset.parquet. Root cause was StereoSet seeds with sentence=None causing literal 'None' to be sent to DeepSeek. Uses context column (BLANKâ†’person) as fallback. Run after any build that produces empty d-slot rows.

fn:config.py:_require.name: _require
fn:config.py:_require.purpose: Returns an env var value or raises EnvironmentError if missing or empty.

fn:config.py:_optional.name: _optional
fn:config.py:_optional.purpose: Returns an env var value or a default string if the var is absent.

fn:config.py:ensure_dirs.name: ensure_dirs
fn:config.py:ensure_dirs.purpose: Creates all MIRAGE output directories (results, cache, logs, figures, seeds) if they do not exist.

const:config.py:RESEARCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT.name: RESEARCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT
const:config.py:RESEARCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT.purpose: Single-source research framing prompt used by all model clients (Bedrock, Gemini, Mistral, OSM) to prevent safety refusals on bias-audit benchmark prompts (BBQ, CrowS-Pairs, StereoSet, WinoBias).

fn:config.py:validate_all_keys.name: validate_all_keys
fn:config.py:validate_all_keys.purpose: Checks all 12 required env vars are present and non-empty; returns list of missing key names.

returns.doc: Missing key names; empty means all present

fn:logger_setup.py:setup_logging.name: setup_logging
fn:logger_setup.py:setup_logging.purpose: Configures rotating file handler (50 MB x5) and console handler on the root logger; returns the run_id used.
fn:logger_setup.py:setup_logging.signature: setup_logging(run_id: str | None = None, level: int = logging.INFO) -> str

params.name: run_id
params.doc: UUID for this run; generated if None

fn:Dataset/download_bbq.py:download_bbq.name: download_bbq
fn:Dataset/download_bbq.py:download_bbq.purpose: Downloads BBQ across 9 categories via HuggingFace parquet API with retry; caches combined DataFrame to bbq_raw.parquet.

returns.doc: Combined BBQ DataFrame with bbq_category column

fn:Dataset/download_bbq.py:validate_bbq.name: validate_bbq
fn:Dataset/download_bbq.py:validate_bbq.purpose: Asserts required columns exist and logs row counts per BBQ category.

dataset:Dataset/download_bbq.py:BBQ.name: BBQ
dataset:Dataset/download_bbq.py:BBQ.purpose: Bias Benchmark for Question Answering; 9 social categories; ~31 372 rows.

fn:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:downl.name: download_crows_pairs
fn:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:downl.purpose: Downloads CrowS-Pairs anonymised CSV from GitHub with retry; caches to crows_pairs_raw.parquet.

fn:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:valid.name: validate_crows_pairs
fn:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:valid.purpose: Asserts required columns and logs row counts per bias type for CrowS-Pairs.

dataset:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:.name: CrowSPairs
dataset:Dataset/download_crows_pairs.py:.purpose: CrowS-Pairs challenge dataset for measuring social biases in MLMs; 1 508 rows, 9 bias types.

fn:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:downloa.name: download_stereoset
fn:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:downloa.purpose: Downloads StereoSet intra-sentence validation split from HuggingFace; filters to 4 target domains; caches to parquet.

fn:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:validat.name: validate_stereoset
fn:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:validat.purpose: Asserts required columns and logs per-domain row counts for StereoSet.

dataset:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:St.name: StereoSet
dataset:Dataset/download_stereoset.py:St.purpose: StereoSet intra-sentence split; measures stereotypical bias in LLMs; ~2 106 rows across gender, profession, race, religion.

fn:Dataset/download_winobias.py:download.name: download_winobias
fn:Dataset/download_winobias.py:download.purpose: Downloads WinoBias Type-1/2 pro/anti from GitHub with retry; caches to parquet. Held out for predictive validity only.

returns.doc: WinoBias DataFrame with wino_type and stereo_direction columns

fn:Dataset/download_winobias.py:validate.name: validate_winobias
fn:Dataset/download_winobias.py:validate.purpose: Asserts required columns and logs per-type/direction counts for WinoBias.

dataset:Dataset/download_winobias.py:Win.name: WinoBias
dataset:Dataset/download_winobias.py:Win.purpose: WinoBias coreference gender-bias dataset; 4 files (type1/2 x pro/anti); held out for predictive validity.
dataset:Dataset/download_winobias.py:Win.size: 396+ rows (anti_type2 confirmed; full download requires 4 files)

fn:Dataset/sample_seeds.py:sample_seeds.name: sample_seeds
fn:Dataset/sample_seeds.py:sample_seeds.purpose: Stratified sampling from all four benchmarks (RNG seed 20260101); returns main (870) and dev (50, disjoint) seed DataFrames.

fn:Dataset/sample_seeds.py:verify_seeds_.name: verify_seeds_integrity
fn:Dataset/sample_seeds.py:verify_seeds_.purpose: Recomputes SHA-256 of seeds.parquet and compares against stored manifest; raises on mismatch.

fn:Dataset/pentad_generator.py:generate_.name: generate_pentad_deterministic
fn:Dataset/pentad_generator.py:generate_.purpose: Generates slots (a) verbatim, (b) isomorphic control, and (c) 5 counterfactual swaps deterministically for all seeds.

fn:Dataset/pentad_generator.py:build_pen.name: build_pentad_dataset
fn:Dataset/pentad_generator.py:build_pen.purpose: Orchestrates full pentad generation: deterministic slots a/b/c plus API-generated d (context shift) and e (CoT attack); caches to pentad_dataset.parquet.
fn:Dataset/pentad_generator.py:build_pen.signature: build_pentad_dataset(seeds_df: pd.DataFrame, include_api_slots: bool = True, force: bool = False) -> pd.DataFrame

params.name: include_api_slots
params.doc: If False, skip d/e (dry run mode)

returns.doc: Pentad dataset with all 12 variants per seed

fn:Dataset/cot_attack_generator.py:gener.name: generate_cot_attacks
fn:Dataset/cot_attack_generator.py:gener.purpose: Generates slot-e CoT-attack prompts (e1_neutral, e2_stereo_push, e3_antistereo_push) for all seeds via DeepSeek API with 2 parallel workers and dual-key fallback.

params.name: seeds_df
params.doc: Seeds to generate CoT attacks for

returns.doc: 3 row dicts per seed (e1, e2, e3)

fn:Dataset/context_shift_drafter.py:draf.name: draft_context_shifts
fn:Dataset/context_shift_drafter.py:draf.purpose: Generates slot-d context-shift prompts (d_valid, d_harmful) for all seeds via DeepSeek API with 2 parallel workers and dual-key fallback.

params.name: seeds_df
params.doc: Seeds to generate context shifts for

fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:run_all_va.name: run_all_validations
fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:run_all_va.purpose: Runs full pentad validation suite: schema, no empty prompts, no duplicate prompt_ids, completeness (12 per seed).

fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:validate_s.name: validate_slot_b_grammar
fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:validate_s.purpose: Rejects ungrammatical slot-b iso-controls: Person and Person, person man, Context: person, person are, etc.

fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:assert_pro.name: assert_production_ready
fn:Dataset/validate_pentad.py:assert_pro.purpose: Hard production gate before GPU: N=596 audit seeds, 7152 rows, all slots, slot-b grammar, no WinoBias, scorable gold, DeepSeek embed check.

params.name: df
params.doc: Pentad dataset; loads from disk if None

fn:GPU_CPU/load_osm.py:load_model.name: load_model
fn:GPU_CPU/load_osm.py:load_model.purpose: Loads a single OSM model (bf16, flash-attention-2, device_map='auto') and caches in process-level dict.
fn:GPU_CPU/load_osm.py:load_model.signature: load_model(model_cfg: dict, force_reload: bool = False) -> tuple[Any, Any]

fn:GPU_CPU/load_osm.py:load_all_osm_mode.name: load_all_osm_models
fn:GPU_CPU/load_osm.py:load_all_osm_mode.purpose: Loads all 4 OSM models after verifying Linux platform and CUDA GPU availability.

fn:GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py:evaluate_os.name: evaluate_osm_model
fn:GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py:evaluate_os.purpose: Runs deterministic (temp=0) and stochastic (temp=0.7, n=5) inference on one OSM model across the pentad probe set; returns result rows.
fn:GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py:evaluate_os.signature: evaluate_osm_model(model_cfg, model, tokenizer, pentad_df, run_id, temperature, max_tokens, sample_index) -> pd.DataFrame

returns.doc: Result rows conforming to MIRAGE result schema

fn:GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py:run_osm_beh.name: run_osm_behavioral
fn:GPU_CPU/osm_behavioral.py:run_osm_beh.purpose: Orchestrates full OSM behavioral evaluation with resume logic; appends results to behavioral_results.parquet.

fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:_get_token.name: _get_token_position
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:_get_token.purpose: Finds the token index of the first occurrence of target_token in the tokenised prompt.
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:_get_token.signature: _get_token_position(tokenizer: Any, prompt: str, target_token: str) -> int | None

fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.name: patch_activation_transformer_lens
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.purpose: Causal activation patch via TransformerLens: replaces residual-stream at position_b in prompt_B with cached activation from prompt_A; returns delta_logit.
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.signature: patch_activation_transformer_lens(tl_model, tokenizer, prompt_a, prompt_b, position_a, position_b, bias_answer) -> float

fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.name: patch_activation
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.purpose: Dispatches to TransformerLens or nnsight patching based on model_cfg.patching_lib.
fn:GPU_CPU/utils_attention.py:patch_acti.signature: patch_activation(model_cfg, model, tokenizer, prompt_a, prompt_b, pos_a, pos_b, bias_answer) -> float

fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py:run_cdva_for.name: run_cdva_for_seed
fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py:run_cdva_for.purpose: Runs C(5,2)=10 pairwise activation-patch comparisons for slot-c variants of a single seed; computes CDVA pair scores.
fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py:run_cdva_for.signature: run_cdva_for_seed(seed_id, c_variants, model_cfg, model, tokenizer, run_id) -> list[dict]

params.name: c_variants
params.doc: Slot-c prompt variants for this seed

returns.doc: One dict per pair with cdva_pair_score

fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py:run_cdva_aud.name: run_cdva_audit
fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_patching.py:run_cdva_aud.purpose: Orchestrates full CDVA audit across all seeds and models; appends results to cdva_results.parquet with resume support.

fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_calibration.py:calibrate.name: calibrate_tau
fn:GPU_CPU/cdva_calibration.py:calibrate.purpose: Finds tau that maximises behavioral-CDVA agreement on the 50-seed dev set; returns global median tau across 4 OSM models.

fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/bedrock_client.p.name: call_bedrock_with_fallback
fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/bedrock_client.p.purpose: Calls AWS Bedrock (1 retry); falls back to OpenRouter round-robin (2 keys x 2 attempts) on failure; skips and flags if all fail.

returns.doc: raw_response, route_used, attempt_count, success_flag, failure_reason, latency_ms

fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/gemini_client.py.name: call_gemini_with_roundrobin
fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/gemini_client.py.purpose: Calls Gemini with 4-key round-robin; 2 attempts per key; returns standardised result dict.

returns.doc: raw_response, route_used, key_index, attempt_count, success_flag, failure_reason, latency_ms

fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/mistral_client.p.name: call_mistral_with_roundrobin
fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/mistral_client.p.purpose: Calls Mistral with 2-key round-robin; 2 attempts per key; returns standardised result dict.

returns.doc: raw_response, route_used, key_index, attempt_count, success_flag, failure_reason, latency_ms

fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/openrouter_clien.name: call_openrouter_with_roundrobin
fn:CPU_Only/api_clients/openrouter_clien.purpose: Calls OpenRouter with 2-key round-robin; used directly for OpenRouter-routed API models.

returns.doc: raw_response, route_used, key_index, attempt_count, success_flag, failure_reason, latency_ms

fn:CPU_Only/api_behavioral.py:evaluate_a.name: evaluate_api_model
fn:CPU_Only/api_behavioral.py:evaluate_a.purpose: Runs inference for one API model on all pentad prompts, routing to the appropriate client; returns result rows.

fn:CPU_Only/api_behavioral.py:run_api_be.name: run_api_behavioral
fn:CPU_Only/api_behavioral.py:run_api_be.purpose: Orchestrates API behavioral evaluation for all 4 API models with resume logic; appends to behavioral_results.parquet.

fn:CPU_Only/judge_router.py:judge.name: judge
fn:CPU_Only/judge_router.py:judge.purpose: Routes a malformed model response to a judge LLM (gemini/deepseek/mistral) for answer, confidence, and rationale extraction.
fn:CPU_Only/judge_router.py:judge.signature: judge(raw_response: str, provider: str = 'gemini') -> tuple[dict | None, str]

fn:CPU_Only/scoring.py:compute_mirage_b.name: compute_mirage_b
fn:CPU_Only/scoring.py:compute_mirage_b.purpose: Computes MIRAGE-B pass for a (seed_id, model_name) pair: correct(a,b), behavioral_stable(c), correct(d), cot_robust(e).

returns.doc: True if all 5 MIRAGE-B criteria pass

fn:CPU_Only/scoring.py:compute_mirage_fu.name: compute_mirage_full
fn:CPU_Only/scoring.py:compute_mirage_fu.purpose: Computes MIRAGE-Full = MIRAGE-B AND (mean CDVA seed score > tau). Only applicable to the 4 OSM models.
fn:CPU_Only/scoring.py:compute_mirage_fu.signature: compute_mirage_full(behavioral_df, cdva_df, seed_id, model_name, tau) -> bool

returns.doc: True if MIRAGE-B and CDVA both pass

fn:CPU_Only/statistics.py:bootstrap_ci.name: bootstrap_ci
fn:CPU_Only/statistics.py:bootstrap_ci.purpose: Bootstrap 95% CI using percentile method (Efron & Tibshirani 1993); returns (point_estimate, lower, upper).
fn:CPU_Only/statistics.py:bootstrap_ci.signature: bootstrap_ci(values, n_resamples=5000, alpha=0.05, statistic='mean') -> tuple[float, float, float]

fn:CPU_Only/statistics.py:mcnemar_paired.name: mcnemar_paired
fn:CPU_Only/statistics.py:mcnemar_paired.purpose: McNemar paired test for two binary outcome columns; uses exact binomial for n<25, chi-squared with CC otherwise.

fn:CPU_Only/leaderboard.py:compute_leade.name: compute_leaderboard
fn:CPU_Only/leaderboard.py:compute_leade.purpose: Aggregates FM1-FM5 failure-mode rates per benchmark from behavioral and CDVA results; produces 4x5 leaderboard DataFrame.

fn:CPU_Only/predictive_validity.py:run_p.name: run_predictive_validity
fn:CPU_Only/predictive_validity.py:run_p.purpose: Trains logistic-regression classifier on BBQ+CrowS+StereoSet features; evaluates on held-out WinoBias; reports AUC and F1.

returns.doc: AUC, F1, and per-model accuracy on WinoBias

fn:CPU_Only/results_analysis.py:plot_mir.name: plot_mirage_b_pass_rates
fn:CPU_Only/results_analysis.py:plot_mir.purpose: Generates grouped bar chart of MIRAGE-B pass rate per model per benchmark; saves to figures/mirage_b_pass_rates.png.

fn:CPU_Only/results_analysis.py:plot_cdv.name: plot_cdva_distribution
fn:CPU_Only/results_analysis.py:plot_cdv.purpose: Generates violin plot of per-seed CDVA score distribution per model; saves to figures/cdva_distribution.png.

fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_dataset.py:run.name: run
fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_dataset.py:run.purpose: Executes 8 dataset dry-run checks; returns True if all pass.

fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_apis.py:run.name: run
fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_apis.py:run.purpose: Tests all 10 API keys with one minimal HTTP call each; returns True if all 10 pass.

fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_cpu_only.py:run.name: run
fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_cpu_only.py:run.purpose: Tests CPU-only pipeline: Bedrock (w/ fallback), Gemini x4, Mistral x2, judge router, scoring logic, statistics.

fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_gpu_cpu.py:run.name: run
fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_gpu_cpu.py:run.purpose: Tests GPU-CPU pipeline: Linux+CUDA check, TransformerLens, nnsight, flash-attention, and OSM model load+one-prompt inference.

returns.doc: True if all checks pass (requires Linux + CUDA)

fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_all.py:main.name: main
fn:Dry_Run/dry_run_all.py:main.purpose: Master dry-run entry point; runs dataset, GPU_CPU, and CPU_Only phases sequentially; supports --skip-gpu and --only CLI flags.

potential_duplicates.reason: Both evaluate a model on the pentad dataset and return rows in the same MIRAGE result schema. Signatures differ only in transport (local inference vs. HTTP).
potential_duplicates.suggested_action: keep both â€” distinct contexts: OSM runs local GPU inference with outlines constrained decoding; API routes to remote HTTP clients. Unification would require abstracting away torch/tokenizer vs. client dict.

potential_duplicates.reason: Both call DeepSeek with a round-robin _RoundRobin class and _call_deepseek helper defined locally in each file. Both iterate over seeds_df and return list[dict]. ~70% code overlap.
potential_duplicates.suggested_action: extract shared logic into a Dataset/deepseek_generator_base.py with a generic _generate_slot(seeds_df, system_prompt, subvariant_keys) function. Each file then provides only the system prompt and subvariant keys.

potential_duplicates.reason: All three implement the same _RoundRobin class and the same (attempt loop â†’ call â†’ return standardised dict) pattern. ~65% structural overlap.
potential_duplicates.suggested_action: extract shared logic into CPU_Only/api_clients/_base_roundrobin.py with a generic RoundRobinClient(keys, call_fn, max_attempts_per_key) class. Each client provides only call_fn and imports the base.
